School of Psychology, South China Normal University

华南师范大学 心理学院

Junyu Liang

梁俊煜

梁俊煜

Ph.D. in Psychology

心理学博士

My research examines how people make social decisions in complex contexts. I focus on intergroup relations, social norms, and spontaneous deception, as well as how the brain integrates emotional information from auditory and visual cues. To address these questions, I use behavioral experiments, EEG/ERP, representational similarity analysis, and drift-diffusion modeling.

我关注群际关系与社会规范对自发欺骗行为的影响及其神经机制，同时研究人脑如何整合来自听觉和视觉通道的情绪信息。我的研究结合EEG/ERP、表征相似性分析（RSA）、漂移扩散模型（HDDM）与行为实验。

View Publications Download CV
JL
Focus
Social cognition, deception, audiovisual integration
Methods
EEG, ERP, RSA, HDDM, microstate analysis
Location
Guangzhou, China

About

Education & Background / 教育背景

2022 - Present

Ph.D. in Psychology

心理学博士

South China Normal University

School of Psychology; Advisor: Prof. Jun Chen. Research on intergroup relations, social norms, and spontaneous deception.

华南师范大学心理学院；导师：陈俊教授。研究方向为群际关系与社会规范对自发欺骗的影响。

2018 - 2021

M.A. in Basic Psychology

基础心理学硕士

Liaoning Normal University

Research Center of Brain and Cognitive Neuroscience; Advisor: Prof. Wenbo Luo. Thesis on crossmodal emotional priming by linguistic and nonlinguistic vocalizations.

辽宁师范大学脑与认知神经科学研究中心；导师：罗文波教授。硕士论文：语言与非语言声音对情绪面孔和词汇加工的启动效应。

2013 - 2017

B.A. in Applied Psychology

应用心理学学士

Guangzhou University of Chinese Medicine

Advisor: Prof. Lijun Ma.

广州中医药大学；导师：马利军教授。

2021 - 2022

Research Assistant

科研助理

Liaoning Normal University

Research Center of Brain and Cognitive Neuroscience.

辽宁师范大学脑与认知神经科学研究中心。

Research

Research Interests / 研究方向

Intergroup Relations & Social Norms

群际关系与社会规范

Investigating how intergroup dynamics and social norms shape spontaneous deceptive behavior and its underlying neural mechanisms.

探索群际动态和社会规范如何塑造自发欺骗行为及其神经机制。

Social Cognitive Neuroscience of Deception

欺骗的社会认知神经科学

Using EEG and computational modeling (HDDM) to understand the cognitive processes involved in honest and dishonest decision-making.

运用EEG与计算建模（HDDM）理解诚实与欺骗决策中的认知过程。

Emotional Audiovisual Integration

情绪视听整合

EEG studies on how visual and auditory emotional signals are integrated in the brain, examining the role of attention, sound continuity, and signal clarity.

通过EEG技术研究视觉与听觉情绪信号在大脑中的整合机制，关注注意力、声音连续性和信号清晰度的调节作用。

Crossmodal Emotional Priming

跨模态情绪启动

How linguistic and nonlinguistic vocalizations differentially shape the perception of emotional faces and words, using ERP and RSA approaches.

使用ERP和RSA方法，探讨语言性与非语言性发声如何以不同方式影响情绪面孔和词汇的感知。

EEG & Multivariate Decoding

EEG与多变量解码

Time-resolved representational similarity analysis, microstate analysis, and single-trial modeling to track the neural dynamics of affective-semantic dimensions.

运用时间分辨表征相似性分析、微状态分析和单试次建模，追踪情感-语义维度的神经动态。

Publications

Selected Publications / 代表性论文

2025

Vocalization Type Shapes the Temporal Dynamics of Crossmodal Emotional Word Recognition: An Electroencephalography Study

Liang, J., Zhang, M., Yang, L., Luo, H., Li, H., Chen, J., & Luo, W.

Psychophysiology, 62, e70201

(Psychology Q2, JCR Q1, IF = 4)

Paper (PDF)

2025

How Linguistic and Nonlinguistic Vocalizations Shape the Perception of Emotional Faces: An Electroencephalography Study

Liang, J., Zhang, M., Yang, L., Li, Y., Li, Y., Wang, L., Li, H., Chen, J., & Luo, W.

Journal of Cognitive Neuroscience, 37(5), 970–987

(Medicine Q3, JCR Q2, IF = 3.6)

Paper (PDF)

2022

Sound Gaps Boost Emotional Audiovisual Integration Independent of Attention: Evidence from an ERP Study

Liang, J., Li, Y., Zhang, Z., & Luo, W.

Biological Psychology, 168, 108246

(Medicine Q3, JCR Q1, IF = 3.5)

Paper (PDF)

2025

The Impact of Attentional Resources on Emotional Expressions Revealed by Event-Related Potentials

Yang, L., Li, S., Liang, J., Liu, S., Chen, J., & Luo, W.

Psychophysiology, 62, e70186

(Psychology Q2, JCR Q1, IF = 4)

Paper (PDF)

2024

The Impact of Degraded Vision on Emotional Perception of Audiovisual Stimuli: An Event-Related Potential Study

Li, Y., Wang, J., Liang, J., Zhu, C., Zhang, Z., & Luo, W.

Neuropsychologia, 194, 108785

(Psychology Q3, JCR Q2, IF = 2.8)

Paper (PDF)

2020

Processing of Homophonic Chinese Two-Part Allegorical Sayings: Effects of Homophonies and Various Lengths of Time Intervals

Liang, J., et al.

Studies of Psychology and Behavior, 18(3), 325–331

Paper (PDF)

Projects

Projects & Research Artifacts / 项目与研究产出

Intergroup Pressure and Spontaneous Deceptive Behavior

群际压力对自发欺骗行为的影响及其神经机制

Graduate Research Innovation Project at SCNU (2024-2025). Principal investigator investigating the neural mechanisms of how intergroup pressure influences spontaneous deception under Prof. Jun Chen.

华南师范大学研究生科研创新项目（2024-2025学年），项目主持人，在导师陈俊教授指导下开展研究。

EEGDeceptionIntergroupHDDM
Open project

Crossmodal Emotional Priming: EEG & RSA

跨模态情绪启动：EEG与RSA

Investigating how linguistic vs. nonlinguistic vocalizations modulate emotional word recognition using time-resolved representational similarity analysis.

使用时间分辨表征相似性分析，考察语言性与非语言性发声如何调节情绪词汇识别。

EEGRSACrossmodal
Open project

Sound Gaps & Audiovisual Integration

声音中断与视听整合

ERP and microstate study examining how interrupted sounds enhance emotional audiovisual integration under different attentional states.

通过ERP与微状态分析，研究中断声音在不同注意状态下如何增强情绪视听整合。

ERPMicrostateAttention
Open project

Reproducible EEG Analysis Pipeline

可复现EEG分析流程

Analysis scripts, preprocessing workflows, and visualization code for transparent EEG/ERP research.

用于透明EEG/ERP研究的分析脚本、预处理流程与可视化代码。

Open SciencePythonMATLAB
Open project

Skills

Technical Skills / 专业技能

Neuroimaging / EEG

  • Event-Related Potentials (ERP)
  • Time-Frequency Analysis
  • Representational Similarity Analysis (RSA)
  • Inter-Subject RSA (IS-RSA)
  • EEG Microstate Analysis
  • Single-Trial Modeling
  • EEG Connectivity Analysis

Computational Modeling

  • Hierarchical Drift-Diffusion Model (HDDM)
  • Cognitive Modeling
  • Statistical Modeling

Programming

  • Data Processing & Analysis
  • Python
  • MATLAB

Awards

Honors & Scholarships / 获奖与荣誉

During my Ph.D., I received the Second-Class Scholarship three times and the Third-Class Scholarship once. I also served as a reviewer for Social Cognitive and Affective Neuroscience (SCAN).

博士期间获得二等奖学金三次，三等奖学金一次，曾担任 Social Cognitive and Affective Neuroscience (SCAN) 的审稿人。
